data.title: First Ntl (NASDAQ:FXNC) Q4 earnings reveal beat with EPS of $0.62 (3.0%) vs. $0.6 estimate, revenue down $833K.
data.description: First National (NASDAQ: FXNC) released its Q4 earnings on Thursday, January 29, 2026, at 08:30 AM. According to the report, the company surpassed estimated earnings by 3.0%, with an EPS of $0.62 compared to the estimated $0.6. However, revenue saw a decrease of $833 thousand from the corresponding period in the previous year. In the quarter preceding this, First National had fallen short on its earnings performance. For more details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Denmark's B2C ecommerce market expected to reach US$119.69 billion by 2025, growing at 6.3% annually, with a CAGR of 10.5% during 2020-2024.
data.description: In Dublin, the latest report "Denmark B2C Ecommerce Market Size & Forecast by Value and Volume Across 80+ KPIs - Databook Q4 2025 Update" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The Denmark ecommerce market is projected to see a 6.3% annual growth rate, with an estimated value of US$119.69 billion by 2025. From 2020 to 2024, the country's ecommerce sector showed strong growth, achieving a CAGR of 10.5%. This positive trend is expected to persist, indicating further expansion in the market.

The current upward trend suggests continued expansion in the foreseeable future.

data.title: Andersen Consulting partners with iNNOVATEQ from Muscat to enhance digital transformation services.
data.description: In a recent announcement from San Francisco, Andersen Consulting has signed a Collaboration Agreement with iNNOVATEQ, a digital transformation company based in Muscat. This strategic partnership aims to leverage the expertise of both firms to enhance their services. Andersen Consulting, a renowned global consultancy, has joined forces with iNNOVATEQ to drive innovation and growth in the digital transformation space. This collaboration is expected to bring significant value to clients of both companies.

data.title: GE Vernova Inc. (NYSE: GEV) reports Q4 revenue of $10.956B, up 4%. EPS at $2.79 misses estimate. Backlog increases to $150B.
data.description: GE Vernova Inc. (NYSE: GEV ) released its fourth-quarter results, showcasing mixed performance. The quarter saw a revenue increase to $10.956 billion, a 4% rise from $10.559 billion, surpassing the $10.213 billion analyst prediction. However, the reported EPS of $2.79 fell short of the estimated $3.18. Despite this, the diluted GAAP EPS climbed to $13.39 compared to $1.73 in the previous year. The company highlighted its robust financial performance in 2025, particularly in Power and Electrification, although Wind posed challenges. The backlog boosted to $150 billion. For a comprehensive overview, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Cullen/Frost Bankers (NYSE: CFR) beat Q4 earnings estimates by 4% with EPS of $2.56 vs. $2.46. Revenue down $530.53M y-o-y.
data.description: Cullen/Frost Bankers (NYSE: CFR) announced its Q4 earnings on January 29, 2026, at 09:00 AM. They surpassed estimated earnings by 4.0%, with an EPS of $2.56 compared to the expected $2.46. The revenue decreased by $530.53 million year-over-year. The historical earnings summary indicates the company outperformed expectations. For further details, refer to Benzinga.com.

data.title: New Tomodachi Life game launching on Nintendo Switch on April 16 after 10 years. Players can create Mii characters.
data.description: In a recent announcement from Redmond, Washington, Nintendo revealed details about the upcoming release of the first new Tomodachi Life game in over a decade for the Nintendo Switch. The game, titled Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream, will be available starting April 16. Players will have the opportunity to create Mii characters inspired by people in their lives and will be able to experience various elements in the game. Additionally, the game will also be compatible with the next-generation Nintendo Switch 2 system.

data.title: Belgium B2C ecommerce market to reach $21.85 billion by 2025, growing at 6.4% annually with a CAGR of 8.6% during 2020-2024. Service expectations to rise with foreign players' presence.
data.description: A report on the Belgium B2C Ecommerce Market predicts a 6.4% annual growth rate, projecting a value of US$21.85 billion by 2025. The market experienced significant growth from 2020 to 2024, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8.6%. The forecast indicates this upward trend will persist in the coming years.

data.title: AUX AIR USA to showcase SEER 30 efficiency and 'Hello Lisa' voice control at AHR Expo 2026, booth #SU 1873.
data.description: AUX AIR USA, a subsidiary of HVAC leader AUX, revealed plans to showcase high-efficiency residential comfort innovations at the 2026 AHR Expo in South Plainfield, New Jersey. Among the features are products with SEER 30 performance, integration of 'Hello Lisa' voice control with Wi-Fi, and an expanded line of multi-zone and ducted systems aimed at simplifying and accelerating installations. Interested parties including distributors, rep firms, contractors, and media are encouraged to visit Booth #SU 1873 for demonstrations and further information.

data.title: CSI appoints Abe Kuruvilla as Chief Information & Technology Officer in Paducah, Ky., to oversee technology strategy and modernization.
data.description: In Paducah, Kentucky, CSI has appointed Abe Kuruvilla as the new Chief Information & Technology Officer. Kuruvilla will be responsible for spearheading the organization's technology strategy and advancement across the company.

data.title: In 2025, Infigo reports 18.2% growth, leading in web-to-print software with focus on digital ordering and automation.
data.description: Infigo, a prominent provider of enterprise web-to-print solutions, announced a remarkable 18.2% revenue surge in 2025. This growth is attributed to the increasing popularity of digital ordering, customization, and automation in the print sector. Through cutting-edge innovation and AI integration in product development, Infigo is establishing itself as an industry trailblazer. Douglas Gibson, the CEO and Founder of Infigo, highlighted the company's tech-centric approach, revealing that nearly 50% of their workforce is comprised of developers and tech professionals.

data.title: MG Properties buys Dylan Point Loma Apartments in San Diego. Acquisition of multi-family community in Point Loma neighborhood.
data.description: San Diego's MG Properties, a leading multifamily real estate investment company, revealed their recent purchase of Dylan Point Loma Apartments in the desirable Point Loma neighborhood. The acquisition marks a significant move in the local property market.
